wiki.summary: “LAST OF A DYING BREED“ is the fifth and final single released by Joji for his fourth studio album, Piss In The Wind. The song was teased twice by Joji with the first being a Floppy Disk that was sent to fans who bought merchandise from his website. The second teaser would come through the website vault.jojimusic.com in which fans had to use a code made up of the song's track position and length to hear a snippet of the song. On January 20, 2026, the song was announced to be released on January 23, 2026. Read more on Last.fm.
